reviews.review_description:
Very promising tool, but you must create an effect from a pre-existing audio file or haptic effect. Too bad. I would like to create from scratch very simple and short effects with a visual tool (that can send files on my quest easily); this one can't… for now I hope.
Lacks maybe integration for SteamVR on the Unity SDK…

Nevertheless, I enjoyed the simplicity (conciseness) of the SDK. Thumbs up for that!

reviews.review_title: Great tool for a game dev
reviews.review_description: Great tool for a game dev
